name: Oatmeal-Banana Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the whole wheat flour, rolled oats, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and sugar.
2. Add the egg, vegetable oil, low-fat milk, and cubed banana to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
3. Spoon the batter into an oiled muffin tin or paper muffin cups, filling each cavity about 2/3 full.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 15 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes 12 muffins. One Muffin: Calories: 180; Carbohydrates: 29g; Protein: 5g; Fat: 5g; Sodium: 91mg; Potassium: 221mg; Cholesterol: 23mg. Exchange Value: 1 Bread Exchange + 1 Fruit Exchange + 1 Fat Exchange.
